name: sdr-tools
description: Internal SDR tooling for Claude Code — lead sourcing, CRM ingestion, and cold-email drafting.

plugins.name: sdr-plugin
plugins.description: Automate the SDR outbound pipeline: find and qualify leads (Clay MCP + web + CSV), ingest them into HubSpot via REST API, and draft personalised cold emails for human review — with confirmation gates and an audit trail at every irreversible step.
